description: Router copy for the root grafana-util(1) manpage.
Keep these summaries short. Detailed workflow explanation belongs in namespace and subcommand manpages.
top_level_intro: Use this page as a router: pick the namespace first, then open the namespace or subcommand manpage for detailed options and examples.
Each entry below is a command family, not the full workflow reference.

top_level_commands.summary: Dashboard workflows: browse, export, import, review, diff, edit, publish, and capture.
Alerting workflows: export, import, diff, plan, apply, delete, list, and author alert resources.
Datasource workflows: list, browse, export, import, diff, create, modify, delete, and inspect supported types.
Access workflows: manage users, orgs, teams, service accounts, and service-account tokens.
Configuration workflows: create, inspect, validate, and reuse repo-local connection profiles.
Read-only status workflows: live readiness, staged checks, overviews, snapshots, and generic resource reads.
Workspace workflows: scan, test, preview, package, and apply one local Grafana workspace.
Snapshot workflows: export and review local dashboard and datasource inventory bundles.
